hook: A breakup can leave you more suggestible to fantasy because the bond is gone while the emotional motion is still active.
body: Part of recovery is letting the nervous system catch up to what reality has already decided.
voices: Psychology Today, The School of Life

hook: Many men interpret early breakup pain as proof they should reopen the relationship immediately.
body: Pain is real, but it is not always guidance toward reunion.
voices: Psychology Today, The School of Life

hook: Pain is real, but it is not always guidance toward reunion.
body: Missing someone intensely in the first weeks may reflect attachment withdrawal more than genuine relational wisdom.
voices: Psychology Today, The School of Life

hook: Missing someone intensely in the first weeks may reflect attachment withdrawal more than genuine relational wisdom.
body: Do not make major reconnection decisions from the peak of the first emotional wave.
voices: Psychology Today, The School of Life
